overall.description: A slow, atmospheric drone shot gliding along a misty fjord or lake shoreline with steep rocky cliffs on the right and obscured mountains in the distance. The footage features heavy fog, desaturated cool tones, and cinematic lighting characteristic of high-end game engine rendering.

segments.scene_description: The drone moves slowly along a foggy waterfront, keeping a rocky cliff face on the right. The atmosphere is thick with mist, obscuring the distant mountains across the calm water. A tall spire is barely visible through the fog in the distance, while evergreen trees cling to the cliff top.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty fjord shoreline with rocky cliffs and cave formation

events.description: a dark cave entrance becomes visible in the cliff face as the drone moves forward

agents.ego_description: continuing along the foggy shoreline, passing by a cave entrance in the cliff while maintaining steady forward motion

entered.detail: dark rectangular opening or cave mouth in the lower cliff face

segments.scene_description: As the drone continues along the cliff, the distant mountains fade from view while the tall spire appears slightly closer through the persistent fog. A dark cave entrance becomes visible in the rocky cliff face on the right. The scene maintains its moody, desaturated atmosphere with the calm water stretching into the mist.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moody, mist-shrouded waterfront that gradually reveals hidden features of a rocky coastline. It begins gliding beside a steep cliff face where evergreen trees cling to the summit and a distant spire is barely perceptible through the thick fog. As the drone continues its forward trajectory, the far-off mountains fade further into the haze while the mysterious spire appears to draw closer. The scene then shifts focus toward the immediate cliffside, where a dark cave entrance emerges from the stone wall. Finally, the camera maintains its steady path over the calm, desaturated water as the landscape remains enveloped in a persistent, cinematic mist.
